raw.official description: Deploy Turret's throw range is increased by 50% and it can now attach to walls and ceilings.
raw.ability details: * Cannot attach to fences and other breakables.

raw.official description: Forge Hammer can restore armor health to allies. Turret gains 25 increased HP and Turret repair's heal is increased by 25%.
Activating Overload fully refills Rivet Gun's ammo.
Move 20% faster while Forge Hammer is equipped.
raw.ability details: * Stacks additively with other movement speed bonuses.

raw.official description: Overload upgrades your Turret for 5 seconds, increasing its health and damage.
raw.ability details:
* The turret must be placed before Overload is activated to take effect.
* The turret has a 2 second upgrade delay during which it cannot fire.
* If Overload is activated when the turret is being deployed, it will start upgrading once it has been constructed.
* The duration is counted from the activation of Overload, meaning that upgrade time included the actual uptime of the upgraded turret is only 3 seconds.
* The upgraded turret gains +150 health and in addition to its regular fire, it shoots a burst of 3 missiles every 1.5 seconds each missile dealing 30 damage.

raw.ability details:
* ''Removed upon the rework on October 9, 2018.''
*Torbjorn can obtain [[scrap]] from the deaths of enemies, teammates, or his own death.

abilities.name: Build Turret

raw.official description: Torbjörn constructs an enemy-tracking autocannon. He can use his Forge Hammer to repair or upgrade it, increasing its health and adding a second cannon barrel.
raw.fire rate:
2/4/5 rounds per second
0/0/4 rockets per second
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed upon the rework on October 9, 2018.''
* The turret automatically fires at nearby enemies, filling [[Molten Core|Torbjörn's Ultimate]] as it does so. 
* The turret has three upgrade levels:
** A Level 1 turret has 150 health and one gun barrel. Five hits from the Forge Hammer will upgrade it to Level 2.
** A Level 2 turret has 300 health and two gun barrels.
** A Level 3 turret has 800 health, two gun barrels and a rocket launcher. This upgrade is only active during [[Molten Core]].
* The turret's HP must be full for it to be upgraded. If it takes damage, it must be repaired first.
** An exception to this is when Molten Core is activated on a Level 2 turret. All health is restored.

abilities.name: Deploy Turret
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile (deploying turret) [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan (turret fire)

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile (deploying turret)
[[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan (turret fire)
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 48 * Turret deploy can be thrown to a maximum distance of 15 meters on ground level. * Turret automatically attacks the closest enemy within line of slight and continues attacking that enemy until it is either dead or out of sight. ** Target can be changed if the player damages said enemy with [[Rivet Gun]]'s primary fire. * Turret can be manually destroyed using the Interact key, which instantly inflicts 10,000 damage to it. This can be done while Torbjörn is dead. ** Cannot be done while the Turret is building itself. * Turret cannot be redeployed if it has dealt or received damage within the last 3 seconds. The Deploy Turret key will appear colored to indicate this. ** If the Turret is destroyed during this time, including by the Interact key, Deploy Turret will go on a longer cooldown. * The Turret projectile is not affected by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] or [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]], but its shots interact normally with these effects. * Turret can be placed on [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] regardless of which was deployed first. When the platform is destroyed, the turret falls on ground. * The projectiles destroys fences and other breakables it collides with while in flight.

raw.official description: Torbjörn deploys an armor upgrade; either he or his allies can pick it up to absorb some damage.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed upon the rework on October 9, 2018.''
*A player can only pick up another armor pack once they have taken damage (excluding any [[shield]] damage) since picking up their last pack, which resets their total bonus armor to 75. When someone other than Torbjörn picks up a pack, they and Torbjörn receive an on-screen notification.
*Torbjörn can have a maximum of 10 armor packs out at any one time. Crafting an eleventh will make the oldest despawn.

raw.official description: Gain additional extra health as well as improved attack, movement, and reload speed.
raw.fire rate:
2.5 shots/s (Primary Fire)
2 shots/s (Secondary Fire)
1.67 swings/s (Forge Hammer)
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 175 while firing primary
* Damage per second: 250 while firing secondary
* Damage per second: ~135 while using forge hammer
* Restores 6 ammo upon activation.
* Increases Rivet Gun's primary fire rate 37.5% and secondary fire by 40%.
* Increases Forge Hammer's swing rate by ~35% and decreases the initial swing time by 0.11 seconds.
* Overload's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Molten Core
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (pools)

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (pools)
raw.official description: Create pools of molten slag that damage enemies. Deals additional damage to armor.
raw.damage:
25 (impact)
190 per second (pools, base)
+100 (pools, bonus against [[armor]])
raw.fire rate:
1 ammo per 0.144 (if holding primary)
1 ammo per 0.016 (manual rapid fire)
raw.ability details: * Torbjörn's weapon is temporarily replaced by his claw, which shoots out balls of molten slag. * The projectiles bounce from walls, and upon landing on ground create pools that deal damage over time. * Against armor, the pools deal 290 damage per second. * Damage from pools do not stack: two pools in the same area deal the same damage as one pool. * The projectiles can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the pools are unaffected. * The impact damage from Molten Core can be affected by [[damage amplification]], but the damage over time cannot. * [[File:Ability-torbjorn1.png|middle|link=Torbjörn#Rivet Gun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Rivet Gun|Rivet Gun]]'s ammo is replenished upon activation.

raw.official description: After overheating his personal forge, Torbjörn gains a significant amount of armor and scrap. He also attacks (and builds and repairs turrets) far faster than normal.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed upon the rework on October 9, 2018.''
*Torbjorn passively generates 1% Ult Charge every 3.25 seconds.
*An existing Level 2 Turret will automatically upgrade to level 3 when Molten Core is activated.
*An existing Level 1 Turret will automatically upgrade to level 3 when upgraded to Level 2 if Molten Core is activated.
*When Molten Core expires, the Turret will automatically downgrade to level 2.
*The ability name is a reference to a raid in one of Blizzard's other games, "[[Warcraft|World of Warcraft]]".
